markdown.markdown:
```{=html}
Discover.
Learn. Go Pro.

Well-structured, carefully curated courses — from computer fundamentals to cloud deployment. Every course is independent, project-driven, and taught by a practitioner who builds real software.

🖥️ 1 Foundation 🧩 2 CS Essentials ⌨️ 3 Languages 🌐 2 Web Dev ✨ 1 Publishing 🚀 2 Infra 🔀 2 Core Tools
🔁 Included Automatically

Common Tools

Free with any course · Starts Week 1
🔀
Tool 01 · Mandatory

Git & GitHub

Version control is non-negotiable. Every student who writes code is automatically enrolled. Your work needs a proper home from day one.

init · add · commit Branching Pull · Push 2-3 classes
✨
Tool 02 · Recommended

Vibecoding — AI-Assisted Dev

Not a language — a methodology. Use Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot as genuine co-developers alongside any course. Ship faster.

Prompting Cursor AI Debugging 2-3 weeks
All Courses Open

Explore individual courses ↓

Computer Foundation

A comprehensive, all-in-one course for non-technical beginners. Start from absolute zero.

Beginner Friendly
🖥️
Foundation

Computer Foundation

Everything a non-technical person needs to become a confident computer user and tech-aware professional. From how a computer works, to operating systems, productivity software, internet skills, and an overview of where technology is heading.

⏱ 6 Months 👥 Absolute Beginner 🎓 Certificate
Enroll Now More details
💻
Fundamentals

Hardware, CPU, RAM, storage, I/O devices

⚙️
Intro to OS

Windows/Linux navigation, settings, basic commands

📊
MS Office + Excel

Formulas, VLOOKUP, pivot tables, charts

🔧
OS Tools

Task Manager, backups, antivirus, troubleshooting

🌐
Internet Ops

Browsers, effective search, email, digital safety

✨
Tech Overview

Cloud, GenAI, Web Dev — what they are

CS Essentials

The two foundational pillars of computer science every serious programmer must master.

2 Independent Courses
🧩
CS Essentials · 01

Data Structures & Algorithms

100+ curated problems spanning every major pattern. Taught in Python and C++ simultaneously. The single course that makes every interview easier and every codebase cleaner.

⏱ 12 Weeks 🧩 100+ Problems 🔑 Python or C++
Enroll Now More details
🌍
CS Essentials · 02

Computer Networks

How the internet actually works — from physical signals to HTTP requests. Every developer, sysadmin, and cloud engineer needs this. Understand OSI, sockets, and Wireshark.

⏱ 8 Weeks 🌐 OSI Layer 1–7 👥 All Levels
Enroll Now More details

Programming Languages

Three independent language courses. Each is a proper, standalone curriculum — not a crash course.

3 Independent Courses
🔩
Languages · 01

C Programming

The language closest to the machine. Learn C and understand how computers store data and manage memory.

⏱ 8 Weeks📦 4 Projects
🔀 Git · ✨ Vibecoding Incl.
Enroll Now More details
⚡
Languages · 02

C++ Programming

Object-oriented design, templates, and the STL. The language of game engines, trading systems, and performance.

⏱ 10 Weeks🔑 C Prereq
🔀 Git · ✨ Vibecoding Incl.
Enroll Now More details
🐍
Languages · 03

Python

From scripting to AI/ML. Python opens every door in modern software, AI, and research. Clean and beginner-friendly.

⏱ 10 Weeks📦 5 Projects
🔀 Git · ✨ Vibecoding Incl.
Enroll Now More details

Web Development

Two focused, sequential courses covering the complete foundations of building things for the web.

Sequential · Git Included
🎨
Web Dev · 01

HTML + CSS

The building blocks of everything on the web. Write semantic HTML and beautiful, responsive CSS. Build pixel-perfect layouts with Flexbox and Grid.

⏱ 6 Weeks📦 4 Live Sites
🔀 Git · ✨ Vibecoding Incl.
Enroll Now More details
⚡
Web Dev · 02

JavaScript

Make the web interactive. Learn modern ES6+ JavaScript from first principles, with real projects that go live on the internet.

⏱ 6 Weeks🔑 HTML+CSS Prereq
🔀 Git · ✨ Vibecoding Incl.
Enroll Now More details

Publishing & AI

Build complete, beautiful websites using Quarto — and supercharge every step with AI tools.

Our Agency Specialty
🌐
Publishing

Quarto + Vibecoding + GitHub → Live Website

Quarto is the modern way to publish technical work — websites, blogs, reports, slide decks. Pair it with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) at every step: generating content, writing CSS, and deploying automatically via GitHub Actions.

⏱ 4 Weeks 🌐 Live URL by Day 7 📦 4 Outputs
🔀 Git & GitHub · ✨ Vibecoding Core
Enroll Now More details
🌐
Personal Website

Multi-page site with custom theme

📝
Technical Blog

Post-based blog with tags & RSS

📊
Data Report

HTML report with Python charts

🎞️
Slide Deck

Revealjs presentation with animations

Deployment & Infrastructure

Take your projects to the real internet. Two independent infrastructure courses — Linux and AWS.

Cert Aligned
🐧
Infra · 01

Linux & RHEL Administration

Master the command line, system services, storage, security hardening, and shell automation — structured around the RHCSA exam.

⏱ 10 Weeks🎓 RHCSA Aligned
Enroll Now More details
☁️
Infra · 02

AWS & Cloud (Docker Included)

From fundamentals to production-grade deployments on AWS. Core compute, Docker containerisation, and serverless architectures.

⏱ 10 Weeks🎓 SAA-C03 Aligned
Enroll Now More details
All Courses Open

Not sure where to start?

New to tech? Start with Foundation. Want to code? Start with Git + any language. Want a live website fast? Jump straight into Quarto + AI. We'll help you map the right path.

Book a Free Consultation View All Schedules
```
